CrawlOrchestratorState.description: State model derived from CrawlOrchestrator TLA+ spec

TypeOK.description: Verifier for invariant TypeOK from CrawlOrchestrator spec

Phase1BeforePhase2.description: Verifier for invariant Phase1BeforePhase2 from CrawlOrchestrator spec

Phase1FlagAccurate.description: Verifier for invariant Phase1FlagAccurate from CrawlOrchestrator spec

SemaphoreNonNeg.description: Verifier for invariant SemaphoreNonNeg from CrawlOrchestrator spec

ConcurrencyBound.description: Verifier for invariant ConcurrencyBound from CrawlOrchestrator spec

conditions:
\A i \in 1..DFSLen :
        i \in p1_done =>
        (\A j \in 1..(i-1) : j \in p1_done
DFSSequentialOrder.message:
DFSSequentialOrder violation: \A i \in 1..DFSLen :
        i \in p1_done =>
        (\A j \in 1..(i-1) : j \in p1_done)
DFSSequentialOrder.description: Verifier for invariant DFSSequentialOrder from CrawlOrchestrator spec

NoPhase2BeforeSignal.description: Verifier for invariant NoPhase2BeforeSignal from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and phase in {"idle", "phase1", "phase2", "complete"}
    and dfs_idx in 1..(DFSLen + 1)
    and p1_done \subseteq 1..DFSLen
    and p2_done \subseteq PendingNodes
    and semaphore in 0..SemMax
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_Phase1BeforePhase2.description: Test assertion for Phase1BeforePhase2 from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_Phase1FlagAccurate.description: Test assertion for Phase1FlagAccurate from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_SemaphoreNonNeg.description: Test assertion for SemaphoreNonNeg from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_ConcurrencyBound.description: Test assertion for ConcurrencyBound from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_DFSSequentialOrder.condition:
\A i in 1..DFSLen :
        i in p1_done implies
        (\A j in 1..(i-1) : j in p1_done)
assert_DFSSequentialOrder.message:
Assertion failed: DFSSequentialOrder — \A i \in 1..DFSLen :
        i \in p1_done =>
        (\A j \in 1..(i-1) : j \in p1_done)
assert_DFSSequentialOrder.description: Test assertion for DFSSequentialOrder from CrawlOrchestrator spec

assert_NoPhase2BeforeSignal.description: Test assertion for NoPhase2BeforeSignal from CrawlOrchestrator spec
